creator: maniactraq@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 216371
mod_auth_openid poudriere build log

libopkele was recently updated to fix an openssl error and now mod_auth_openid will not get through the configuration stage when building but fails with the error:

> checking for OPKELE... no
> configure: error: no libopkele library found (version 2.0 or higher). get one from http://kin.klever.net/libopkele/
> ===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.

The poudriere build log is attached.
